prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约9454→11202→10964→11767→10445名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1000名；2025年基准位次约10445名；该校在河南理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2022年均为369人，2023年372人，2024年374人，2025年372人；2026年计划442人，较2025年扩招约18.8%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第27名（近年稳定在23–27名区间），属于国内顶尖高校行列；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及原校长张尧学涉嫌严重违纪违法被查事件，对学术声誉有一定影响；抖音综合热度排名第85位（评价一般），短视频曝光量中等偏低；2024–2025年曾出现投档线异常/断档信号；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共13个学科：冶金工程A+、护理学A+、材料科学与工程A、临床医学A-、交通运输工程A-、土木工程A-、计算机科学与技术A-、机械工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、化学工程与技术A-、基础医学A-、管理科学与工程A-、马克思主义理论A-；冶金、材料、医学、计算机等学科实力突出，与招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等专业社会热度高热/推荐，中南大学在这些领域均有招生，对考生吸引力较强；河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万（较2025年物理类+历史类合计约90.7万大幅增加），竞争加剧；中南大学位于湖南长沙，属邻省，对河南考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南招生占比约4%–7%（2025年物理类372人占全国总招生约6.6%），是该校重要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+18.8%）对竞争的缓解作用、河南省考生总数显著增加带来的竞争加剧、声誉偏负面可能降低报考热度，以及优势学科与热门专业对考生的持续吸引力，预测2026年理科（物理类）最低位次约11574名，区间11074–12074名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 9454 → 11202 → 10964 → 11767 → 10445, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1000 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 10445; the enrollment plan for this university in Henan science (physics category) was 369 in 2021–2022, 372 in 2023, 374 in 2024, and 372 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 442, an increase of about 18.8% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 27th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (stable in the 23–27 range in recent years), belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the former president Zhang Yaoxue being investigated for serious violations of discipline and law, which has a certain impact on academic reputation; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 85th (average evaluation), with medium-low short video exposure; there were abnormal/signal of cutoff line anomalies in 2024–2025; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Basic Medicine A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, Marxist Theory A-; disciplines such as metallurgy, materials, medicine, and computer science are particularly strong and highly related to the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine are highly popular/recommended in society; Central South University offers these majors, which strongly attract candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan general college entrance examination is about 1.2 million (a significant increase from the combined total of about 907,000 for physics and history categories in 2025), intensifying competition; Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, a neighboring province, which has a strong regional appeal to Henan candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Henan is about 4%–7% (372 in physics category in 2025 accounts for about 6.6% of total national enrollment), making it one of the important source provinces for the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the mitigating effect of the significant 2026 enrollment expansion (+18.8%) on competition, the intensified competition due to the notable increase in total Henan candidates, the somewhat negative reputation that may reduce application enthusiasm, and the sustained appeal of advantageous disciplines and popular majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the 2026 science (physics category) will be approximately 11574, with a range of 11074–12074.

- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Clinical and Stomatology Medical Programs).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With a predicted ranking in the 11074–12074 range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Software Engineering, Mathematics, etc.) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, etc.) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Chemical and Pharmaceutical, etc.) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (<11074), prioritize aiming for top Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1195 → 1331 → 1168 → 1351 → 1475, with an overall backward shift in recent years, accumulating a shift of about 300 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1475; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Henan was 23 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 33 students in 2025; the 2026 plan is 44 students, an expansion of about 33.3% compared to 2025, which is significant and has a notable alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 27th in the 2026 main ranking of the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the former president being investigated; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 85th (average evaluation); abnormal signals in admission cutoffs appeared in 2024–2025; advantageous disciplines in liberal arts include Marxist Theory A-, etc.; enrollment majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Foreign Languages and Literature match the university's disciplinary layout.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity, Chinese Language/Literature has high social popularity, and popular liberal arts majors have high application enthusiasm; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan general college entrance examination is about 1.2 million, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying competition; Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, a neighboring province, which has a strong regional appeal to Henan candidates; the proportion of liberal arts enrollment in Henan has increased in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of declining rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+33.3%) alleviating competition, the intensified competition due to a notable increase in the total number of candidates in Henan, the negative reputation potentially reducing application enthusiasm, and the sustained appeal of popular liberal arts majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature), the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 liberal arts (history category) is approximately 1740, with a range of 1540–1940.
